title: Tender Delicious Ukrainian Fatty Meat Dumplings
description: Moist and delicious Ukrainian-style dumplings filled with fatty meat. Serve with your favorite soups or stews.
instructions: Combine 00 flour, salt, sugar, and egg in a large mixing bowl. Gradually add in warm water while mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and let rest for 30 minutes.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin sheet.
Combine beef fat, ground beef, onion, garlic, and a pinch of salt and pepper in a separate mixing bowl.
Place a tablespoon of the meat mixture onto a sheet of dough and fold the dough over to form a half-moon shape, sealing the edges.
Bring a large pot of water to a boil and gently add the dumplings. Cook for 10-15 minutes or until they float to the surface.
Drain the dumplings and serve with your favorite soups or stews.
Freeze any leftover dumplings for up to 2 months.
